synopsis: Pulsating bioluminescent formations within a vast cavern evolve and respond to unseen vibrations, creating a dynamic visual symphony.

shots.prompt: Camera drifts into a vast, dark cavern where immense, organic-looking formations of deep teal rock slowly begin to glow with internal lime-green light, resembling dormant spores.

The glowing formations pulse and expand, as if breathing, sending out ripples of electric orange light that echo across the cavern walls, revealing more intricate, fractal textures, camera slowly exploring.

The entire cavern erupts in a symphony of synchronized bioluminescent pulses, the formations blooming into complex, alien flora of neon colors, the light waves creating impossible, ephemeral structures that appear and disappear.

The intense light show subsides, the formations receding into a gentle, soft glow of teal and lime, the cavern returning to a serene, dimly lit space, camera slowly moving towards a distant, softly glowing exit.
